name: Battered Onion Crispers
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice 1 large Spanish onion into 3/8-inch strips and set aside.
2. Sift 1 cup flour and 1 teaspoon paprika into a bowl.
3. Beat 1 egg yolk into 1 cup of ice-cold water and quickly blend it into the flour mixture. Small lumps may be present, but that's okay; avoid overmixing.
4. Coat 2 or 3 onion strips at a time and carefully drop them into 2 inches of hot oil.
5. Separate the coated onion strips with a fork.
6. Fry for 1-2 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Drain on paper towels and keep warm until ready to serve.
8. Sprinkle generously with salt and pepper.
